children.name: source_department
children.description: The department that originated the data

children.name: target_department
children.description: The department that will receive the message

children.name: product_name
children.description: Name of the investment product being offered

children.name: eligibility_criteria
children.description: Conditions that make a customer eligible for the product

fields.name: eligible_customers
fields.description: One entry per customer eligible for the product

children.name: email
children.description: Email address of the eligible customer

children.name: account_balance
children.description: Current balance in the customer's account

children.name: customer_tenure_months
children.description: Number of months the customer has been with the investment company

children.name: investment_experience_level
children.description: Level of experience the customer has in investments

children.name: risk_profile
children.description: Risk tolerance of the eligible customer

children.name: last_investment_activity
children.description: Date of the customer's last investment activity

children.name: recommended_product_allocation
children.description: Recommended allocation for the eligible customer in the product

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Summary information about the eligible customers

children.name: total_eligible_assets
children.description: Total value of assets eligible for the product

children.name: average_account_balance
children.description: Average account balance of eligible customers

children.name: campaign_priority
children.description: Priority level for the marketing campaign
